---
title: "DEM_processing"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-16"
---

```{r}
# This section just runs once. It takes the DEM and saves a slope rater than can be loaded in, in the next section.
file = "DEM/Elevation/2 Metre/"
filename =list.files(path=paste0(WKDir,file), pattern = ".tif", full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
rasters_2 <- lapply(filename, function(fn) terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, file, fn)))
merged_2  <- do.call(mosaic, c(rasters_2, fun=mean))

file = "DEM/Elevation/1 Metre/"
filename =list.files(path=paste0(WKDir,file), pattern = ".tif", full.names = FALSE, recursive = FALSE)
rasters_1 <- lapply(filename, function(fn) terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, file, fn)))
merged_1  <- do.call(mosaic, c(rasters_1, fun=mean))
ras_1 <- terra::aggregate(merged_1, fact = 2, fun = mean)

stiched <- terra::merge(ras_1, merged_2)
rm(ras_1, merged_2)

np_wol_buff_gda94 <- sf::st_transform(np_wol_buff, crs = crs(stiched))
stiched_wol <- terra::crop(stiched, vect(np_wol_buff_matched), mask=TRUE)
slope <- terra::terrain(stiched_wol, v="slope", unit="degrees", neighbors=8)

#terra::writeRaster(slope, paste0(WKDir, "DEM/slope.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing
slope <- terra::rast(paste0(WKDir, "data/DEM/slope.tif")) # slope from Elvis DEM tiles
#slope_wol_save <- terra::crop(slope, vect(np_wol_buff_gda94), mask=TRUE) # This line takes a while. Try and keep loaded
#terra::writeRaster(slope_wol_save, paste0(WKDir, "DEM/slope_wol.tif"), overwrite = TRUE) ## Commented out to prevent re-writing
```
